title: Two earbuds screen/second screen, right zoom in
scenario: Quick Start Guide earbuds screen zooms in and displays new text when tapping the right circle button
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to the Quick Start Guide (QSG).
Swipe or tap to view the second screen (earbuds screen) of the QSG.
Tap the right circle button on that screen.
expected: The screen zooms in and displays new text as expected.
